block_01: Every trader needs a plan that they could closely follow within the day. Have you ever felt lost, not knowing where to start? A trading plan ensures that all the details are taken care of and that you concentrate on the important things: taking advantage of the market.
block_02: This article is a ready-to-use checklist which you may adapt to your personal needs and use as a reference for your own trading strategy.
block_03: Read the full article to learn about the 4 steps on the way to a more organized trading approach
